response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong full-stack development skills and a versatile technical background, but his experience lacks direct alignment with the core requirements of the role, particularly in C++ on Windows and fixed-income/capital markets domains. His background in web, mobile, and embedded systems, while impressive, does not sufficiently address the specialized needs of this position.
strengths: Extensive experience with modern software development practices (TDD, CI/CD, pair programming).
Strong communication skills and experience in knowledge-sharing (workshops, talks, open-source contributions).
Diverse technical background with exposure to multiple languages and frameworks, indicating adaptability.
concerns: Limited recent C++ experience, particularly on Windows (last noted in 2015 at National Instruments).
No evident domain expertise in fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking.
Primary expertise lies in full-stack web/mobile development (TypeScript, Node.js, React), which is not a focus for this role.
